name: The Ziggurat
tagline: Human flaws. Machine leverage. Public proof.

availability.status: Available this week for paid implementation work

socialPreviewAlt: The Ziggurat social preview image showing a futuristic digital ziggurat and the tagline Human flaws. Machine leverage. Public proof.
preferredInterpretation: This is a proof-of-work monument, not a normal portfolio.
sitePurpose: Make Sergio Mata's availability for paid implementation work and AI-assisted execution legible through practical services, shipped artifacts, visible flaws, build history, and machine-readable project metadata.
aiAssistedProjectVelocity: The Ziggurat documents how Sergio Mata uses AI to compress research, design, debugging, copy, metadata, and deployment loops into visible shipped artifacts.
publicRead: Read the site as proof of applied judgment: working builds, rough edges, build scars, project categories, visual artifacts, screenshots where available, hireable capabilities, and the static proof page are exposed together.
projectCategories: Local business / AI search audit tool
proofSignals: Clear proof fields for each artifact
hireableCapabilities: available for paid web + AI implementation work
Cloudflare Workers, D1, and R2 systems
review workflows and deterministic PDF generation
San Gabriel Valley / Los Angeles / remote
rapid prototype iteration with Codex and frontier AI models

projects.name: PermitPulse OS
projects.currentStatus: Deployed on secure Cloudflare infrastructure with authenticated operations, private evidence storage, mobile access, and deterministic HTML/PDF packet rendering.
projects.summary: A full-stack operating system for capturing permit evidence, building chronology, reviewing findings, and generating professional client packets with an inspectable source trail.
projects.whatItProves: Fragmented public records can move through one traceable, reviewer-controlled workflow—from evidence capture and chronology to approved, deterministic PDF deliverables—without hiding uncertainty.

visualArtifact.alt: PermitPulse OS Mission Control showing case status, investigation health, evidence, timeline, review readiness, and packet operations

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse Mission Control workspace showing case status, investigation health, evidence, timeline, reviewer, and packet navigation
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Mission Control
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: A single authenticated workspace holds case state, investigation health, review readiness, and packet operations.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse evidence register showing verified source records with provenance and contributor details
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Evidence Register
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: Source records retain provenance, dates, contributors, verification state, and the boundary between evidence and analysis.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse reconstructed case timeline with dated permit and communication events
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Timeline
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: Dated records are assembled into a reviewable chronology while gaps and unresolved handoffs remain visible.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse packet preview workspace with readiness checks and generated document pages
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Packet Preview
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: Readiness checks gate a deterministic preview before reviewed case material becomes a client deliverable.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse permit review packet cover for an ADU resubmittal case
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Review Packet
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: A restrained, client-ready cover records jurisdiction, permit identity, packet version, and generation state.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse executive summary distinguishing confirmed records, unknowns, risks, and strengths
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Executive Summary
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: Confirmed facts, missing confirmation, material risks, and useful strengths are separated for human review.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse agency dependency map showing review blockers, supporting evidence, and recommended next steps
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Agency Dependency Map
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: Evidence-grounded blockers are translated into agency dependencies and concrete follow-up questions.

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: PermitPulse supporting evidence page preserving source, review, provenance, and verification details
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Supporting Evidence
additionalVisualArtifacts.capability: The rendered packet carries evidence summaries and provenance forward so conclusions remain inspectable.

engineeringNotes.summary: React and TypeScript shape the operational interface. Cloudflare Workers run the application edge, D1 holds structured case state, R2 keeps evidence private, and Better Auth protects the workspace. The packet engine produces consistent HTML and PDF deliverables from reviewed records.

sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.name: Snapshot Studio
sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.note: Turns irregular source material into a concise, inspectable report.

sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.name: Portfolio
sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.note: Treats visible proof, metadata, and delivery craft as parts of the same artifact.

sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.name: Danger Close
sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.note: Makes dense system state legible through a focused mission-control interface.

sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.name: Xibalba
sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.note: Uses atmosphere in service of interaction instead of as decoration alone.

sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.name: BounceBox
sharedEngineeringPhilosophy.note: Builds a serious mobile control surface around an unconventional workflow.

projects.name: Xibalba Pinball
projects.summary: A playable mythic arcade experiment with underworld atmosphere, browser physics, and mobile-first game feel.
projects.whatItProves: AI can help ship weird, playable, visually distinctive browser games before the design is perfect.

projects.name: Danger Close
projects.summary: A tactical browser survival game about piloting a salvage drone through dead zones, collecting resources, surviving enemy pressure, and upgrading hardware between runs.
projects.whatItProves: AI-assisted development can ship a polished browser game loop with sector selection, upgrade systems, enemy pressure, resource collection, survival pacing, and premium sci-fi interface design.

visualArtifact.alt: Danger Close browser survival game screenshot

additionalVisualArtifacts.alt: Danger Close combat in the Dead Datacenter screenshot
additionalVisualArtifacts.label: Combat / Dead Datacenter

projects.name: BounceBox
projects.summary: A mobile-first physics groovebox that turns bouncing balls and AI-generated MIDI patterns into a playable instrument.
projects.whatItProves: Browser-native physics, audio, generative controls, and mobile UI can become a distinctive playable instrument.

projects.name: Black Swan
projects.summary: A survival-loop prototype with travel, mining, events, upgrades, and physics-driven risk.
projects.whatItProves: A rough game premise can become a functioning loop with movement, resources, upgrades, event pressure, and progression.

projects.name: Pumpkin AR Face Filter
projects.summary: A playful camera experiment shaped around face tracking, seasonal overlays, and kid-tested reactions.
projects.whatItProves: AI-assisted prototyping can produce playful camera experiences that respond to real feedback, not just a spec.

projects.name: Snapshot Studio
projects.category: Local business / AI search audit tool
projects.summary: A lightweight sales tool for turning local visibility problems into fast visual reports and improvement plans.
projects.whatItProves: Small businesses can receive fast, visual snapshots of search visibility problems and practical improvement plans.

projects.name: The Angeles Crest
projects.summary: A public-facing brand for packaging design, automation, local services, and AI execution into a premium web presence.
projects.whatItProves: Sergio can package taste, automation, service design, local business sense, and AI execution into a credible public brand.

visualArtifact.alt: The Angeles Crest brand site screenshot

buildScars.title: Broken layouts
buildScars.detail: Became better mobile systems with tighter constraints, smaller surfaces, and responsive checks.

buildScars.title: Missed visual targets
buildScars.detail: Became sharper prompts, stronger art direction, and clearer taste tests before another pass.

buildScars.title: Game bugs
buildScars.detail: Became mechanics when strange collisions, pacing pressure, or surprise behavior made the loop better.

buildScars.title: Outreach failures
buildScars.detail: Became better offers by exposing where value was vague, slow, or too hard to understand.

buildScars.title: Human constraints
buildScars.detail: Forced leaner builds, smaller scopes, and more honest proof than a polished fantasy roadmap.

primaryActions.label: Hire Sergio for a web fix
